# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the pending PR-watch approval watermark remediation in src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs. The real port no longer requests or uses PR updatedAt for approval binding; it binds bot +1 approval to the currently observed head using the latest head push timestamp instead, so non-push PR activity after approval does not incorrectly invalidate CI-green bot-approved PRs. Updated the mock port to apply the same binding behavior and added a regression proving latest_push_at < +1 reaction < later PR updatedAt still merges.","outstanding_risks":["The working tree still contains .ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/journal.ndjson and .ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/run.json orchestration-state modifications outside the requested source-review scope."],"steps":[{"description":"Inspect existing PR-watch approval binding and pending amendment scope.","order":1,"status":"completed"},{"description":"Change approval watermark source from PR updatedAt to latest head push time 

## Steps

1. [Completed] codex implementation turn
